title: Foundation: project setup, types, config, state, budget, output
description: Set up greenhouse project infrastructure and core modules. Create package.json, tsconfig.json, biome.json, .gitignore. Implement src/types.ts (RunState, DaemonConfig, DailyBudget types), src/config.ts (YAML config loader + validation + defaults), src/state.ts (JSONL state persistence with read/write/lock), src/budget.ts (daily cap tracker), src/output.ts (JSON + human output helpers). Include tests for config, state, and budget. Reference SPEC.md for all type definitions and behavior.
closeReason: Foundation complete: 13 files (1228 LOC), 34 tests. Types (RunState/DaemonConfig/DailyBudget), YAML config loader with validation/defaults, JSONL state persistence with advisory locking and dedup-on-read, daily budget tracker, JSON+human output helpers. All quality gates pass.

title: Core pipeline: poller, ingester, dispatcher, monitor, shipper, daemon
description: Implement the 6 core pipeline modules. src/poller.ts (GitHub issue fetcher via gh CLI), src/ingester.ts (GH issue to seeds issue converter with label mapping), src/dispatcher.ts (overstory sling wrapper), src/monitor.ts (run completion watcher polling ov status), src/shipper.ts (git push + gh pr create), src/daemon.ts (main loop orchestrator: poll→filter→dispatch→monitor→ship). Include tests for poller, ingester, dispatcher, monitor, shipper. Reference SPEC.md for all CLI integration details, state machine, retry policies, and JSON schemas.
closeReason: Implemented all 6 core pipeline modules: poller.ts (GitHub issue fetcher via gh CLI), ingester.ts (GH issue to seeds converter with full label mapping), dispatcher.ts (ov sling wrapper), monitor.ts (run completion watcher), shipper.ts (branch push + PR creation + issue linking), daemon.ts (main loop: monitor → ship → poll → filter → budget → ingest → dispatch). Plus 5 test files (29 tests), types.ts, exec.ts, state.ts, budget.ts supporting files, and package.json/tsconfig.json/biome.json infrastructure. 19 files, 1523 lines.

title: CLI & commands: entry point and all 12 command files
description: Implement src/cli.ts (Commander setup, binary name greenhouse/grhs, VERSION const, --json global flag) and all 12 command files in src/commands/: start.ts, stop.ts, status.ts, runs.ts, poll.ts, ingest.ts, ship.ts, init.ts, config.ts, doctor.ts, logs.ts, budget.ts. Include tests for init and doctor commands. Reference SPEC.md for all CLI signatures, flags, and behaviors.
closeReason: Implemented CLI entry point (src/cli.ts with Commander, greenhouse/grhs binary names, VERSION const, --json global flag) and all 12 command files (start, stop, status, runs, poll, ingest, ship, init, config, doctor, logs, budget). Includes tests for init (6 tests) and doctor (7 tests). Two builders: build-cli-core (infra + 6 core commands + tests) and build-ops-v2 (6 ops commands). Both branches merge_ready.

title: Infrastructure: docs, CI/CD, scripts, dotfiles
description: Create all project infrastructure files: README.md, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE (MIT), CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/publish.yml, scripts/version-bump.ts, .claude/commands/release.md. Reference SPEC.md for CI workflow details, version management approach, and changelog format.
closeReason: All 10 infrastructure files created by builder-infra: README.md, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE (MIT), CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/publish.yml, scripts/version-bump.ts, .claude/commands/release.md. Self-verified: all content matches SPEC.md. merge_ready sent to coordinator.
